sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-09-14 08:38
- Distance: 15.3 km
- Moving time: 1:36:30
- Elapsed time: 1:36:35
- Elevation gain: 98.6 m
- Average heart rate: 158 bpm
- Max heart rate: 179 bpm
- Average watts: 199.4 W
- Average speed: 9.5 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `7` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `162.4 bpm`, ranging from `133.0` to `177.6 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `148.3 bpm` and second-half average HR was `172.9 bpm` (+24.7 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `169.8 spm`, with a working range of `100.7` to `177.8 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `166.5 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `172.6 spm` (+6.1 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:18 /km` across `15.310 km` in `1:36:30` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:30 /km` and second-half pace was `6:06 /km` (-24 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `158.0 bpm` average and `179 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `148.6 bpm` in the first half and `169.0 bpm` in the second (+20.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:36:30` out of `1:36:35` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `7` stop segments and `0.7%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `141.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.6 m` and `19.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `72.0 m` in the first half and `69.0 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
